transcript.content: Ugh, today was just the absolute worst. Work was such a disaster and my boss was riding my back about everything. I'm just so exhausted.
I've been running for weeks and just now woke up . I'm so tired .
Yeah, I feel you on the exhaustion. It's not even just today, honestly. It feels like everything has just been piling up lately and I can't ever catch my breath.
It's been a while , but I still feel like I'm going to die of exhaustion .
honestly idk why i even bother anymore. like i work so hard just to feel this exhausted every single day and nothing ever changes.
Not even myself .
Yeah, exactly. It's like nothing really feels worth it lately. I'm just going through the motions and I don't see the point.
feel
sometimes i think everyone would be better off without me. like if i just wasn't here, it wouldn't even matter to anyone anyway.
s .
sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i shouldn't have said that, i'm just really overwhelmed tonight and venting. probably just need to sleep it off.
th a
Yeah, sleep is probably the only thing that helps. Even if I just lie there, it's better than thinking. Are you still feeling that exhausted too, or are you starting to wake up a bit?

Yeah, it's like we're both just completely drained. It's hard when even talking feels like a massive effort. I think I'm just going to try to close my eyes for a bit and see if I can actually get some rest tonight.
horizontate feel

"Horizontate" is actually a pretty perfect word for it. Just lying flat and doing absolutely nothing. I think I'm going to do exactly that. Thanks for just listening to me ramble, it actually helped a little bit.
that?Oh
Haha yeah, just 'horizontate'. I'm literally staring at my ceiling right now. It's just nice to not have to explain myself or pretend to be okay for a second, you know?
What
Just like... pretending everything is fine. At work, with my family, with everyone. I'm just so tired of wearing a mask and acting like I have my life together when I'm actually falling apart.
,justYeah .
Yeah. It's just exhausting trying to keep up appearances. Like, everyone expects me to be this happy, productive 24-year-old who has everything figured out, but inside I just feel completely empty.
(no response generated)
Anyway, sorry for dumping all this on you. It's just rare I actually say it out loud. Usually I just keep it bottled up until I feel like I'm gonna explode.
what is when

What is it like when it all gets to be too much? I guess it's just that feeling where you don't even have the energy to explain why you're sad anymore, so you just shut down. It's like a heavy weight sitting on your chest and you're just waiting for it to lift, but it never does.
this

Yeah, exactly. 'This' is just... my reality right now, I guess. Just this constant heavy feeling. But I've ranted enough for one night. I think I'm finally going to close my eyes and try to get some of that sleep we talked about. Thanks again for just being here.
Debor
